pre_write_code.description: Scan edits for hardcoded secrets (API keys, tokens, passwords, private keys)

pre_run_command.description: Block destructive commands (rm -rf, DROP DATABASE, terraform destroy, etc.)

pre_read_code.description: Prevent reading .env, private keys, credentials, and other sensitive files

post_write_code.description: Log file write actions to audit log

post_run_command.description: Log command executions to audit log

post_read_code.description: Log file read actions to audit log

post_mcp_tool_use.description: Log MCP tool invocations to audit log
